channel.title: Validation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Validation on Arrans github.io

item.title: cue-lang/cue
item.description: The home of the CUE language! Validate and define text-based and dynamic configuration

item.description: KCL Programming Language (CNCF Sandbox Project). https://kcl-lang.io

item.description: Protocol Buffer Validation - Being replaced by github.com/bufbuild/protovalidate

item.title: h2non/filetype
item.description: Fast, dependency-free Go package to infer binary file types based on the magic numbers header signature

item.title: mingrammer/commonregex
item.description: 🍫 A collection of common regular expressions for Go

item.title: mountain-pass/addressr
item.description: Free Australian Address Validation, Search and Autocomplete
